naturalMeaning: 把系统中的各个模块、工具或组件连接起来使其协同工作
example: Once you've got the tool defined, you just wire things up in the agent config and you're good to go.
exampleTranslation: 工具定义好之后，在代理配置里连接一下就行了。

naturalMeaning: 通过优化提示词、增加上下文或引入更优策略来提升智能体的表现
example: We need to make the agent smarter by giving it better few-shot examples in the system prompt.
exampleTranslation: 我们得在系统提示词里给代理更好的示例，让它更聪明一点。

naturalMeaning: 提供更多背景信息，帮助智能体更好理解任务场景
example: The agent keeps getting that wrong — try giving it more context about what the user is actually trying to do.
exampleTranslation: 代理老出错，试试给它更多上下文，告诉它用户到底想干嘛。

naturalMeaning: 非常明确详细地说明，不给歧义空间
example: You have to spell things out for the agent or it'll make assumptions and do the wrong thing.
exampleTranslation: 你得把话跟代理说清楚，否则它就会自己脑补然后做错。

naturalMeaning: 将一个复杂任务拆解成一系列可执行的小步骤
example: Break it down into steps so the agent doesn't get overwhelmed by the complexity.
exampleTranslation: 把它拆成一步步的，代理就不会被复杂任务搞懵了。

naturalMeaning: 留意那些不常见但可能导致出错的特殊场景或异常输入
example: Watch out for edge cases — the agent might try to call a tool with null data and crash the whole pipeline.
exampleTranslation: 注意那些边界情况——代理可能会拿空数据去调工具，把整个流程搞崩。

expression: figure out what the agent needs
naturalMeaning: 分析并确定智能体为了完成任务需要哪些信息、工具或指令
example: Let's figure out what the agent needs before we start writing any code — tools, context, memory, the whole picture.
exampleTranslation: 我们先搞清楚代理需要什么，再开始写代码——工具、上下文、记忆，全都想清楚。

expression: boil it down to the essentials
naturalMeaning: 去除不必要的内容，只保留最关键的部分
example: Boil it down to the essentials — the agent doesn't need a whole essay, just the key instructions.
exampleTranslation: 精简到核心就行——代理不需要一整篇文章，给关键指令就够了。

naturalMeaning: 智能体执行某个预定义的函数或工具操作
example: The agent decided to call a function to look up the user's account balance.
exampleTranslation: 代理决定调用一个函数来查询用户账户余额。

naturalMeaning: 将一个外部工具或API配置到智能体中使其可用
example: You need to wire up a tool before the agent can use it — just adding it to the tools array isn't enough.
exampleTranslation: 你得先把工具接好代理才能用，光加到工具数组里是不够的。

naturalMeaning: 集成或接入到某个现有系统、数据库或API中
example: We can hook into the internal API and let the agent query customer data directly.
exampleTranslation: 我们可以挂接到内部API，让代理直接查客户数据。

naturalMeaning: 将数据或结果继续传递给下一个处理环节
example: The agent gets the search result and passes it along to the summarizer agent.
exampleTranslation: 代理拿到搜索结果，然后把它传给摘要代理。

naturalMeaning: 在出错或条件不满足时提前终止执行，不再继续
example: If the tool returns an error, the agent should bail out instead of trying to forge ahead and make things worse.
exampleTranslation: 如果工具返回错误，代理应该退出，而不是硬着头皮往下走把事情搞得更糟。

naturalMeaning: 将数据或输入内容提供给智能体进行处理
example: Just grab the JSON from the API and feed it to the agent — it'll figure out what to do with it.
exampleTranslation: 从API拿到的JSON直接喂给代理就行，它自己会知道怎么处理。

naturalMeaning: 将多个工具或模块的输入输出连接成一条完整链路
example: It took me a while to plumb things together so the output of the search tool feeds into the formatter.
exampleTranslation: 我花了不少时间才把各个部件串联好，让搜索工具的输出能流到格式化工具里。

naturalMeaning: 将任务控制权或数据从一个组件或代理移交给另一个
example: Once the data is validated, hand it off to the processing agent for the heavy lifting.
exampleTranslation: 数据验证通过后，就交给处理代理去做繁重的工作。

naturalMeaning: 持续维护和关注某些信息或状态，确保不丢失
example: The agent needs to keep track of what it's already asked the user so it doesn't repeat itself.
exampleTranslation: 代理需要跟踪已经问过用户什么了，这样就不会重复问同样的问题。

naturalMeaning: 失去对状态、上下文或重要信息的追踪能力
example: After a few turns the agent starts to lose track of the conversation and goes off topic.
exampleTranslation: 几个回合之后代理就开始丢失对话线索，跑题了。

naturalMeaning: 将先前对话或会话中的状态和信息重新加载回来
example: We need a way to bring back the context from the last session so the agent remembers who the user is.
exampleTranslation: 我们得有个办法把上次会话的上下文恢复回来，好让代理记得用户是谁。

naturalMeaning: 持续持有或保存某些信息，不丢弃
example: The agent should hold onto that user preference across the whole session, not just the first turn.
exampleTranslation: 代理应该把用户偏好保留在整个会话期间，不能只记住第一轮。

naturalMeaning: 将信息保存到持久化存储中以备后续使用
example: When the user provides their shipping address, store it away so we don't have to ask again next time.
exampleTranslation: 用户提供了收货地址就存起来，这样下次就不用再问了。

expression: pick up where you left off
naturalMeaning: 从上次中断的地方恢复执行或对话
example: With good persistent memory, the agent can pick up where you left off even days later.
exampleTranslation: 有了好的持久化记忆，即使隔了几天代理也能从你上次中断的地方继续。

naturalMeaning: 能够跨越多次独立对话记住用户信息和历史记录的能力
example: For this use case you really need cross-session memory so the agent remembers returning customers.
exampleTranslation: 对这个场景来说，你确实需要跨会话记忆，这样代理才能记得住回访客户。

naturalMeaning: 多个代理之间交流思路、征求意见或互相评审
example: The two agents bounce ideas off each other before coming to a final recommendation.
exampleTranslation: 两个代理先互相碰撞一下想法，然后再给出最终建议。

naturalMeaning: 将大任务拆解成多个小任务分配给不同代理并行处理
example: We have three agents divide and conquer — one researches, one drafts, and one proofreads.
exampleTranslation: 我们让三个代理分而治之——一个做调研，一个写草稿，一个校对。

naturalMeaning: 让某个额外的代理或人员参与当前的对话或任务
example: If the billing agent can't handle the question, loop in the human support team.
exampleTranslation: 如果账单代理搞不定这个问题，就把人工客服团队拉进来。

naturalMeaning: 像接力赛一样将任务从一个代理传递给下一个代理继续处理
example: Agent A cleans up the raw data and passes the baton to Agent B for analysis.
exampleTranslation: 代理A把原始数据清理干净，然后交棒给代理B做分析。

naturalMeaning: 多个代理之间通过消息、共享内存等方式交换信息
example: The agents talk to each other through a shared message bus so they don't step on each other's toes.
exampleTranslation: 这些代理通过共享消息总线互相通信，这样就不会互相干扰。

naturalMeaning: 让多个代理对齐理解、目标和计划后再开始执行
example: We need both agents to get on the same page about the task before they start executing.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要两个代理在执行之前对任务目标达成一致意见。

naturalMeaning: 专门负责某一特定领域或任务的智能体，而非通用型
example: Rather than one huge agent, I'd rather have several specialized agents that each do one thing really well.
exampleTranslation: 与其搞一个巨大的全能代理，我宁愿要几个专业代理，每个只做一件事但做得特别好。

naturalMeaning: 问题或行为不稳定、时好时坏，无法确切判断原因
example: This bug is hard to pin down — it works fine most of the time but every once in a while it just bombs.
exampleTranslation: 这个bug很难确定原因——大部分时候都没问题，但偶尔就崩了。

naturalMeaning: 系统或代理因为错误、超时或异常而完全停止工作
example: If the rate limit kicks in, the whole pipeline falls over and we have to restart it manually.
exampleTranslation: 如果触发了频率限制，整个流水线就会崩掉，我们得手动重启。

naturalMeaning: 在某个具体环节犯错，通常是因意外情况导致
example: The agent trips up when the input format changes even slightly from what it expects.
exampleTranslation: 只要输入格式跟预期稍微不一样，代理就会出错。

naturalMeaning: 智能体的行为完全失控，产生不可预测或危险的输出
example: Without proper guardrails, the agent can go off the rails really fast and start hallucinating nonsense.
exampleTranslation: 没有好的护栏，代理很快就会偏离轨道，开始胡编乱造。

naturalMeaning: 行为不可预测，时而正常时而出错，缺乏一致性
example: The output is flaky — one run it's great, the next it's complete gibberish with no rhyme or reason.
exampleTranslation: 输出很不稳定——这次跑得很好，下次就全是胡言乱语，毫无规律。

naturalMeaning: 非常稳定可靠，经过充分测试，几乎不可能出问题
example: We need to make the retry logic bulletproof before we ship this to production.
exampleTranslation: 在上线之前，我们需要把重试逻辑做得坚不可摧。

naturalMeaning: 在出错或部分组件不可用时，系统仍能降级运行而非完全崩溃
example: A good agent system has graceful degradation — if one tool is down, it tries a different approach instead of just failing.
exampleTranslation: 好的代理系统能做到优雅降级——一个工具挂了，它会尝试其他方法而不是直接报错。

naturalMeaning: 在操作失败时自动重新尝试的策略，通常包含退避算法
example: Add retry logic with exponential backoff so transient network blips don't kill the whole agent run.
exampleTranslation: 加上带指数退避的重试机制，这样短暂网络波动就不会让整个代理运行挂掉。

naturalMeaning: 确保智能体的行为不越界、不偏离安全或功能范围
example: The content filters keep it on the rails even when users try to get the agent to say something inappropriate.
exampleTranslation: 内容过滤器能让代理保持在轨道上，即使有用户想让它说不合适的话也不行。

naturalMeaning: 采取预防措施来避免某种不良情况或攻击发生
example: We need to guard against prompt injection — a clever user could override the agent's instructions.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要防范提示注入攻击——聪明的用户可能会覆盖代理的指令。

naturalMeaning: 让智能体的输出语气、措辞或行为不那么激烈或极端
example: The agent's response was way too aggressive — we need to tone it down in the system prompt.
exampleTranslation: 代理的回答太冲了，我们得在系统提示词里把语气缓和一点。

naturalMeaning: 让规则和限制更加严格，减少智能体的自由度
example: The agent is hallucinating too much — tighten up the constraints in the system prompt and see if that helps.
exampleTranslation: 代理胡说八道太多了，在系统提示词里把约束收紧一点，看看会不会好一些。

naturalMeaning: 因为代理的操作导致严重故障或数据损坏
example: If you give the agent access to the production database, it could blow up your entire system.
exampleTranslation: 如果你让代理访问生产数据库，它可能会搞炸整个系统。

naturalMeaning: 建立安全边界和限制规则来约束智能体的行为范围
example: Before you deploy any agent in production, you need to put up guardrails around what it can do.
exampleTranslation: 在生产环境部署任何代理之前，你都必须在它能做什么这件事上设好护栏。

naturalMeaning: 智能体的行为和输出不超出预设的边界和限制
example: The safety system makes sure the agent stays within bounds and doesn't access restricted data.
exampleTranslation: 安全系统确保代理不越界，不会访问受限制的数据。

naturalMeaning: 在智能体自动流程中保留人工审核或批准环节
example: For anything involving money, we keep a human in the loop — the agent recommends, the human approves.
exampleTranslation: 凡是涉及钱的，我们都要让人参与进来——代理提建议，人来批准。

naturalMeaning: 了解智能体或系统当前的运行状态和内部情况
example: I can't see what's going on inside the agent's head, so I added logging at every step.
exampleTranslation: 我看不到代理脑子里在想什么，所以我在每一步都加了日志。

naturalMeaning: 深入调查和分析日志、数据或问题以找出根因
example: The output looked wrong so I dug into the logs and found a caching issue.
exampleTranslation: 输出看起来不对，我就深挖了日志，发现了一个缓存问题。

naturalMeaning: 逐步跟踪智能体的推理过程或执行链路来定位问题
example: I stepped through the agent's reasoning step by step to find exactly where it went off track.
exampleTranslation: 我一步步走了一遍代理的推理过程，找到了它到底在哪一步跑偏的。

naturalMeaning: 追踪一次请求从入口到各个工具调用的完整执行路径
example: You can trace the call from the user's question all the way through to the database query.
exampleTranslation: 你可以从用户的问题一路追踪到数据库查询的完整调用链路。

naturalMeaning: 将事件、错误或状态信息写入日志文件
example: Every time the agent calls a tool, log it with a timestamp so we can audit later.
exampleTranslation: 每次代理调用工具时都记录下来，带上时间戳，方便后续审计。

naturalMeaning: 从概览层级进入更详细的子层级来查看具体信息
example: If you drill down into that span, you can see the latency of each individual tool call.
exampleTranslation: 如果你下钻到那个跨段，可以看到每个工具调用的延迟。

naturalMeaning: 系统或智能体内部的运作机制和实现细节
example: The dashboard shows you what's happening under the hood — every prompt, every tool call, every decision.
exampleTranslation: 仪表盘会展示引擎盖下面到底发生了什么——每个提示、每个工具调用、每个决策。

naturalMeaning: 按照某种标准对智能体的输出结果进行评分或评级
example: Have the evaluation agent score the output on a scale of one to five based on accuracy.
exampleTranslation: 让评测代理根据准确率给输出打个一到五分的分数。

expression: run it through the eval suite
naturalMeaning: 将智能体或模型在标准化的测试集上运行以评估性能
example: Run it through the eval suite before you merge anything into the main branch.
exampleTranslation: 在合并到主分支之前，先用评测套件跑一遍。

naturalMeaning: 将输出结果与基准数据或预期标准进行比对
example: We check the agent's output against the golden dataset to see how accurate it is.
exampleTranslation: 我们把代理的输出跟黄金数据集对照检查，看看准确率如何。

naturalMeaning: 询问智能体在测试或运行中的表现和效果
example: How did it do on the new test cases we added this sprint?
exampleTranslation: 这个冲刺新加的测试用例上，它表现怎么样？

naturalMeaning: 人工或自动对智能体的输出进行质量评估和打分
example: We had three human annotators grade the output for accuracy, tone, and completeness.
exampleTranslation: 我们找了三个人工标注员根据准确度、语气和完整性来给输出评分。

naturalMeaning: 在实际场景或测试环境中试用一下看看效果
example: Let's test it out on a few edge cases before we call this done and ship it.
exampleTranslation: 我们先在几个边界用例上试一试，再宣布完工和上线。

naturalMeaning: 在高并发或大量请求的情况下仍然保持良好表现
example: Let's see if the agent holds up under load when we have a thousand users hitting it at once.
exampleTranslation: 我们看看当一千个用户同时访问时，代理能不能撑得住。

naturalMeaning: 通过量化指标来评估系统的性能和效果
example: You can't improve what you don't measure — measure how well it works from day one.
exampleTranslation: 你不能改进你没衡量的东西——从第一天就开始衡量效果。

naturalMeaning: 掌控全局并做出关键决策，决定下一步做什么
example: In this architecture, the orchestrator agent calls the shots and decides which specialist to invoke.
exampleTranslation: 在这个架构中，协调代理说了算，决定调用哪个专业代理。

naturalMeaning: 请求某个代理或服务来执行特定任务
example: When the user asks a math question, call on the calculator agent to handle it.
exampleTranslation: 当用户问数学问题时，调用计算器代理来处理。

naturalMeaning: 将系统的所有部分组合成一个完整的、可运行的解决方案
example: The orchestrator agent ties it all together and manages the flow between all the specialist agents.
exampleTranslation: 协调代理把一切都整合起来，管理所有专业代理之间的流程。

naturalMeaning: 触发一系列预定义的操作或流程开始执行
example: Once the user submits the form, the orchestrator sets things in motion across all the downstream agents.
exampleTranslation: 用户提交表单后，协调代理就会启动流程，调动所有下游代理。

naturalMeaning: 启动一个流程、任务或工作流
example: The cron job kicks off the data pipeline every morning at six.
exampleTranslation: 定时任务每天早上六点启动数据流水线。

naturalMeaning: 协调和管理整个系统中所有组件和代理的协作
example: We use a single master agent to orchestrate the whole thing and decide who does what.
exampleTranslation: 我们用了一个主代理来统筹全局，决定谁做什么。

naturalMeaning: 每个组件或代理只负责自己那部分工作，互不干扰
example: I like this design — each piece does its part and they don't get in each other's way.
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢这个设计——每个组件各司其职，互不干扰。

naturalMeaning: 依次尝试或处理列表中的每个项目
example: The agent cycles through the list of available tools until it finds one that can handle the request.
exampleTranslation: 代理在可用工具列表里循环遍历，直到找到一个能处理请求的。

naturalMeaning: 持续执行某个操作直到满足某个终止条件
example: Keep going until the quality check passes or you hit the maximum number of retries.
exampleTranslation: 一直跑到质量检查通过，或者达到最大重试次数为止。

naturalMeaning: 智能体不断重复相同的操作或推理路径，无法继续前进
example: We had to kill the process because the agent got stuck in a loop calling the same tool over and over.
exampleTranslation: 我们不得不杀掉进程，因为代理陷入了死循环，一遍又一遍地调用同一个工具。

naturalMeaning: 两个或多个代理之间反复交换信息或协商
example: There was so much back and forth between the two agents it took way longer than expected.
exampleTranslation: 两个代理之间来回沟通太多了，导致耗时远比预期长。

naturalMeaning: 重新执行一次迭代循环，通常是修正问题后重试
example: The quality check failed, so we'll fix the issues and go around again.
exampleTranslation: 质量检查没通过，所以我们先修一下问题，然后再来一轮。

naturalMeaning: 重新执行一次先前的操作或流程
example: Let me tweak the prompt a little and run it again to see if the accuracy improves.
exampleTranslation: 我调一下提示词，然后再跑一次，看看准确率有没有提升。

naturalMeaning: 通过反复试验和调整来逐步改进智能体的表现
example: We iterate on the prompt until the accuracy hits at least ninety-five percent.
exampleTranslation: 我们反复迭代优化提示词，直到准确率达到至少95%。
